title: taraxacum bellum
intro: Taraxacum bellum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and act as a diuretic, which helps to reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of Taraxacum bellum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and support the liver and kidneys. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum bellum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin conditions.
